Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Soulbound Vessel]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Calder Marten has a Soulbound Vessel that he can command.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — Calder has a Soulbound Vessel that responds to his Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — Calder's ship is a Soulbound Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — The Soulbound Vessel communicates through impressions, impulses, and pressure rather than words.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The cook's power is focused into his Soulbound Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Calder Marten can sense the presence of his Soulbound Vessel.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — If Naberius Clayborn takes the Heart as his Soulbound Vessel, he would become a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — A Soulbound Vessel was made from a Stormwing's stinger for Tristania.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 3''' — Jerri's Soulbound Vessel started up again.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — Someone returned Jerri's Soulbound Vessel to her in her cell.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Shera has already taken a Soulbound Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — Some speculate Jarelys Teach's Soulbound Vessel makes her a monster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — Shera has a Soulbound Vessel that she handled poorly.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — The Testament is Calder's Soulbound Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Bliss has a Soulbound Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 18''' — A Soulbound Vessel can be a set of tools rather than a single object.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Destroying a Soulbound Vessel can have unpredictable effects on the mind of the Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — The woman's face was ruined from her chin to her Soulbound Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Calder can repair his Soulbound Vessel with love, care, and attention.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 26''' — Foster's Soulbound Vessel took over when he lost consciousness to keep him alive.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — A Soulbound Vessel is a type of entity that can be bound to a person.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — A Soulbound Vessel can be a helmet that allows the user to enter a powerful, berserk state.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 12''' — Interion Darovish's sword and shield are not his Soulbound Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — A Soulbound Vessel is a specific type of object or power associated with individuals like Tyria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 19''' — Loreli raised her Soulbound Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Loreli taps into her Soulbound Vessel to make light.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
